nodes.label: AI as idea enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to generate ideas for content, but never to actually write the content from scratch

nodes.label: AI reliability for important tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I used to use it for more tasks, but I realised there were too many errors and issues to delegate important stuff to AI

nodes.label: AI creativity and uniqueness
nodes.grounding_span: The ideas suggested are often too generic for me

nodes.label: Preserving personal skill and autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely consider preserving my own abilities

nodes.label: AI for routine low-stakes tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Routine stuff like basic emails, I honestly don't care

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and originality
nodes.grounding_span: I want to preserve the personality of my stuff

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it didn't save me any time

nodes.label: Competence and self-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: It's important to maintain a real-life skill set too

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as idea spark
nodes.grounding_span: there will be one thing where you're like, 'yes!!' that's helpful

nodes.label: Frustration with AI lack of creativity
nodes.grounding_span: generating ideas for social media can be annoying

nodes.label: Disappointment with AI for data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: they mostly needed rewriting and recalculating so it didn't save me any time

nodes.label: Openness to future AI use if improved
nodes.grounding_span: If technology becomes better, I would definitely consider using it more

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth prompting
nodes.grounding_span: I often have to push and push for more ideas

nodes.label: Experience-based boundary setting
nodes.grounding_span: I used to use it for more tasks, but I realised there were too many errors
